creator: n@nectar.com
text:
No, it does not use a hard-coded path.  See 
   ${PREFIX}/Acrobat4/Reader/intellinux/app-defaults/AcroRead
You can change lprCommand there.

For some reason, you can't override that setting in ${HOME}/.acrorc.

Cheers,
-- 
Jacques Vidrine / n@nectar.com / jvidrine@verio.net / nectar@FreeBSD.org

On Wed, Feb 21, 2001 at 05:18:57AM -0800, conrad@th.physik.uni-bonn.de wrote:
> 
> >Number:         25251
> >Category:       ports
> >Synopsis:       acroread4 uses hard coded path for lpr
